title: Bounded Host Editing Trial Execution
objective: Execute the first bounded host-editing trial from `/home/olares/code/apex/apex-power-ops-platform` after Packet 013, using a documentation-first or planning-first slice to prove real host-side editing, narrow validation, evidence capture, and rollback posture without approving migration or mutating runtime surfaces.
dependency_note: Packet 013 concludes that `/home/olares/code/apex` is now synchronized to the current governing authority commit and that a later bounded host-editing trial packet may open. This packet exists to execute that first reversible documentation-first or planning-first host-side trial without approving migration. The packet is technical-authority-managed; Codex or Claude Code may act as the bounded executor, but this does not revise the separate Step 2 AI-toolchain verdict or admit Codex as a general Olares executor.
required_inputs: The Packet 013 ruling that the prepared host mirror is now current enough for a bounded host-editing trial packet to open
The Packet 012 bounded-trial rules for allowed actions, disallowed actions, entry criteria, success criteria, failure triggers, rollback triggers, and evidence capture
The governing parent-root publication boundary at `C:/APEX Platform`
The prepared host parent-root mirror at `/home/olares/code/apex` on commit `4856cee293e04b2c419f8761042d4c53e6964ff6`
constrained_outputs: A dated execution handoff recording the exact bounded host-side edit slice, validation results, git evidence, and rollback posture
A recorded statement of whether the first host-side trial succeeded cleanly enough to justify a later second bounded trial or a later readiness reassessment
No migration approval, no host runtime mutation, no old-clone mutation, and no widening into AI-services, Gitea/code-hosting, or canonical-hosting work
validation_steps: Open `/home/olares/code/apex` over `olares-mesh` and confirm branch, commit, remote, cleanliness, git top-level, and implementation-lane path before any edits begin.
Confirm `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` remains untouched historical evidence and is not used as the trial workspace.
Perform exactly one bounded documentation-only or planning-only edit inside `/home/olares/code/apex/apex-power-ops-platform`.
Run narrow non-runtime validation limited to the touched slice, such as `git diff --check`, markdown checks, packet text checks, and git status checks.
Capture workstation and host git status plus diff evidence after the trial edit and record whether rollback remains cleanly available.

Stop if execution would require migration approval, host runtime mutation, service changes, auth or ingress changes, installation work, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, or any mutation of `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes one bounded host-editing trial only. It does not authorize database writes, host-runtime mutation, old-clone mutation, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, or migration approval.
closure_note: Executed as the first bounded host-side documentation edit. The prepared host mirror at /home/olares/code/apex remained on clean-main at 16fe398bfcd74a8cace69fcadeb0193e43f28558, validation passed, rollback stayed limited to the single untracked Packet 014 handoff artifact, and no migration, host runtime mutation, service changes, auth changes, ingress changes, installs, AI-services work, Gitea changes, canonical-hosting changes, or old-clone mutation were performed.
next_action: Open a narrow Packet 015 decision lane to determine whether the Packet 014 host-created handoff should be published through the parent-root authority path or whether one additional bounded documentation/planning trial should run first. Do not treat Packet 014 as migration approval or as authorization for runtime mutation.
